subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! Haji Ghulam-Husayn hath penned a letter, speaking with the tongue of all the friends [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی جناب حاجی غلامحسین نامه ئی از لسان کل یاران نوشته و خامه
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
